items.name: 🐾 Mofu – Shoulder Pup [Companion Accessory]
items.description:
Meet Mofu, the fluffiest little guardian you can carry on your shoulder! This snowy-white pup follows you everywhere, bringing warmth, charm, and a touch of mischief. Whether you’re battling bosses or just hanging out, Mofu is always there to cheer you on.
✨ Highlights:
🐕 Ultra-fluffy 3D model with soft, round design
🎒 Shoulder-mounted pet that stays by your side
💖 Adds personality and coziness to any outfit
🎮 Perfect for casual, kawaii, or adventure game settings
🔍 Keywords: shoulder pet, kawaii dog, companion accessory, Roblox cute
